title: Candle in the Wind
why_this_song: Candle in the Wind by Elton John (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Your candle burned out long before
The toughest role you ever played
Though I never knew you at all
You had the grace to hold yourself

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "candle" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "candle" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Though I never knew you at all
Was that Marilyn was found in the nude

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Candle in the Wind" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Candle in the Wind" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Candle in the Wind", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Candle in the Wind", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Candle in the Wind" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Candle in the Wind" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Candle in the Wind" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Candle in the Wind"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Candle in the Wind" was released in 1973. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Candle in the Wind" foi lançada em 1973. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
